faqs.title: Learn Skills That Get You Hired

blocks.text: College teaches theory. We teach how to build. At TINITIATE, you’ll work on real industry projects in coding, data, and cloud — the exact tools and workflows companies use.

items: Hands-on labs
Real-time projects
Resume-ready portfolio

blocks.text: You’ll graduate with skills you can show, not just a degree.

faqs.title: Bridge the Gap Between College and Career

blocks.text: Most graduates struggle to get their first IT job because they’ve never worked on real codebases. Our program fixes that with practical learning + project mentoring so you can walk into interviews confidently.

items: How to turn classroom concepts into real-world solutions
How to work like a developer in teams
How to think like an engineer, not just a student

faqs.title: Choose the Track That Fits Your Goal

rows: Java / Python, React, SQL, APIs, Spring Boot

blocks.text: Not sure which one fits? We’ll help you choose during orientation.
We understand college life — exams, fests, projects — so our learning model is built for flexibility.

items: Live classes (recorded too!)
Catch-up support for missed sessions
Pause and resume anytime

blocks.text: No pressure, no penalties — just consistent progress.
You’ll go beyond “Hello World.” Each module ends with a real mini-project, and by the end you’ll have:

items: 3–4 deployable projects
A GitHub portfolio recruiters can see
Real experience explaining your work in interviews

blocks.text: Your mentors aren’t just teachers — they’re industry professionals who work in companies and guide you on:

items: What matters in real projects
How to debug, deploy, and document your code
How to prepare for interviews and internships

blocks.text: You’ll receive a TINITIATE STEM Course Certificate with:

items: Duration & skill summary
Project list
Instructor sign-off & verification link

blocks.text: This adds serious weight to your LinkedIn profile and job applications.

items: Crack technical interviews with confidence
Build a strong project portfolio
Understand how to work with teams and clients
Be ready for internships, placements, or freelance gigs
“It felt like an internship, not just a class.”
“We built projects we could show in interviews.”
“Mentors guided us even after sessions ended.”
“My resume looked professional for the first time.”
Join a batch (Foundation → Pro → Work Experience)
Build projects every month
Get guidance on resume & LinkedIn
Participate in mock interviews
Graduate with confidence and proof of skills

faqs.title: Why It’s the Smartest Investment in Yourself

blocks.text: Every hour you put here counts toward your first job, internship, or freelancing career.
Learn. Build. Deploy. Get Hired. That’s the TINITIATE way.

items: Visit www.tinitiate.com
Enroll in the next STEM/IT track
Begin your journey from Student → Industry Professional
